message:
fix(mouse): convert cell to pixel coords for toolbar hit testing

When terminal doesn't support SGR pixel mode (1016h), mouse coordinates
are in cell units, not pixels. Added mouseToPixels() helper to convert
based on CoordinateMapper's is_pixel_mode flag.

Updated all toolbar interaction checks to use converted pixels:
- Button hover detection
- URL bar hover detection
- URL prompt mode click detection
- Tab bar click handling
